  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weens Zauru lausitajs
uhskahps winnu Preekschâ/ tee
ausihs zauri/ un ees zaur tahm
Wahrtn/ un tsees tur ahra/ un
vinno Rehniasch ees us winno
Preekschu/ un tas KUNGS
vinnu Preeksch-Galla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
Nikus gausch pahr to Lauschu Wirfneeku
Negausibu: 1. Un to Preestru: 5. Ta.
pehz buhs Zianai fa Tihrumam artai tapft/
un Jerusalemei par Akmiro-Kohpu klubt:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N es fazztju: Klauſajt
jelle juhs Wirfneeki no
Jehkaba/ un juhs
Waldneeki no Israëta Namma/
eggi jums peeklahjahs to Teefu
nnaht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juhs eenihstat to Labbu/
n eemihlojat to Launu/ juhs
oplehfschat winno Ahdu no win-
eem/ un winno Galtu no win-
o Kauleem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teescham tee irr/ kas to
alttu manno Lauschu ehd/ un
inno Ahdu no winneem no-
hra/ un winnu Rautus fatreez/
pa Gabbaleem faleek itt ka
eend Pohda/ un ka Galtu wee-
i Katla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tee brehks uhs to
NGU/ bet winsch tohs ne
klaufihs/ bet apsflehs tanni
ika farvu Waigu preekfsch win-
ein/ itt ka tee farvos Darbos
fauna darrijschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta takka tas KUNGS
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "teim Praueefcheein/ kas
mannus Laudis peewilt/ kas ar
farveem Sohbeem kohsch/ un is-
fauz Meeru/ bet kas teem ne-
necka dohd winnu Mutte/ tur
tee prett winnu Karzu fluddina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadehs mettifees Nakts
preekfsch jums ar tahs Parahdt-
fchanas/ un Tumfiba buhs
preekfsch jums ar tahs Sihlef-
chanas/ un ta Saule no-ees pahr
fcheein Praueefcheein/ un ta
Deena apmelnohs pahr win-
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Redsetajt taps Kan-
na/ un tee Sihlneeki kaunefees/
un teem buhs wiffeem fawu
Mutti aptiht/ jo nekahda Dee-
wa Atbildeschana buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet teefcham/ es etmu
pilns ar Spehka no ta KliNga
Garra/ un pilns ar Teefas un
Sirde Drohfschibas/ un stahstu
Jehkabam fawu Pahrkahpfcha-
nu/ un Israëtam fawus Greh-
kus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Klauſajt jelle fcho/ juhs
Wirfneeki ta Jehkaba Namma/
un juhs Waldneekt ta Israëta
Namma/ kas juhs to Teefu ue-
gantu turrat/ un wiffu paretsu
Bubfchanu pahrgrohsat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un uhstatfat Zianu ar
Affint/ un Jerusalemei ar Netaif-
nibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winnas Wirfneekt teefa
pehz Dahwanahm/ un wtanas
Preestri mahza par Algu/ un Ze
winnas Praueefchi fhle par
Raudu/ tomehr tee palaischahs
us
"
    }
  ],

  "notes": ""
}
